title: Solution Replay Viewer
summary: Add a full replay viewer that plays back the player's solution step-by-step with signal flow animation. Leverages existing _replayActions recording (gate placements + wire connections with timestamps) to let players watch their solutions rebuild automatically. Includes playback controls (play/pause, speed selection, skip to end), ghost cursor, audio cues during replay, and automatic simulation with signal flow at the end. Also adds share replay via URL encoding and a compare-with-optimal ghost overlay toggle.

tasks.description: Add '📹 Watch Replay' button to the star display (completion screen) for levels that have a saved replay. Button only appears on completed campaign levels with replay data available.
acceptance_criteria: Button with text '📹 Watch Replay' appears in star-display after completing a level
Button is hidden if no replay data exists for the level
Button is hidden in challenge/sandbox/daily modes
Clicking the button starts the replay viewer

tasks.description: Create ReplayViewer class in main.js that loads replay data, clears the current circuit, and replays actions at 2x speed. Each action (addGate, addWire) is played back with the recorded time offsets divided by playback speed.
acceptance_criteria: ReplayViewer class with constructor(gameState, replayData, levelId)
start() method loads the level fresh, clears circuit, then begins playback
Actions are dispatched at correct timing (original time / speed multiplier)
Gate placements use addGate with skipUndo=true
Wire connections use addWireFromData

tasks.description: Add playback controls overlay: play/pause button, speed selector (1x/2x/4x), and skip-to-end button. Controls appear as a floating bar at the bottom of the canvas area.
acceptance_criteria: Replay controls bar appears at bottom of canvas during replay
Play/Pause toggle button works
Speed selector with 1x, 2x, 4x options
Skip-to-end button places all remaining gates/wires instantly
Controls disappear when replay ends

tasks.description: Add progress bar showing replay completion percentage. Visual indicator of how far through the replay we are.
acceptance_criteria: Progress bar fills from 0-100% during replay
Shows action count: 'Action 3/12'
Updates in real-time as actions are replayed

tasks.description: Play original audio cues during replay — gate placement sound and wire connection sound for each action as it's replayed.
acceptance_criteria: Gate placement sound plays when a gate is placed during replay
Wire connection sound plays when a wire is drawn during replay
Audio respects current SFX volume setting

tasks.description: Add playback speed controls: 1x, 2x (default), 4x. Speed affects the timing between actions.
acceptance_criteria: Default playback speed is 2x
Changing speed mid-replay adjusts remaining action timings
1x plays at original recorded speed
4x plays at 4x original speed

tasks.description: After replay ends, automatically run simulation with signal flow animation to show the circuit working.
acceptance_criteria: After last action replayed, 1 second pause then simulation runs automatically
Full signal flow animation plays (not quick test)
Star display shows after simulation completes

tasks.description: Add 'Compare with Optimal' toggle that shows ghost overlay of optimal solution alongside replay (reuses existing ghost overlay system).
acceptance_criteria: Toggle button appears in replay controls if ghost data exists
When enabled, ghost overlay renders during replay (same as existing ghost system)
Toggle state updates the ghostOverlay render flag

tasks.description: Store replay data efficiently: limit to last 30 level replays (LRU eviction), and optimize storage by storing only action type + minimal data + relative timestamp.
acceptance_criteria: Maximum 30 replays stored in localStorage
LRU eviction removes oldest replays when limit exceeded
Replay data includes: actions array, totalTime, gateCount, date

tasks.description: Add 'Replay Status' indicator showing the current state during replay: 'Replaying...', 'Simulation...', 'Complete'. Also disable RUN button and gate placement during replay mode.
acceptance_criteria: Status bar shows 'Replaying solution... (action X/Y)' during playback
RUN button disabled during replay
Gate dragging and wire drawing disabled during replay
Status shows 'Replay complete' at end
A 'Stop Replay' button allows canceling replay early

testing_focus: Replay viewer starts and completes without errors
Skip-to-end correctly places all remaining gates and wires
Simulation runs automatically after replay ends
No interaction leaks during replay (can't place gates, draw wires, or run simulation manually)
Replay controls clean up properly after replay ends
localStorage eviction works when >30 replays stored
Ghost overlay toggle works during replay
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
